allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./server/db'\); db.seedDefaults\(''\); const s = db.getAllSettings\(\); console.log\('model:', s.ai_model\); console.log\('auto_mode:', s.auto_mode\); console.log\('interval:', s.auto_interval_minutes\); console.log\('has prompt:', !!s.ai_prompt\); db.saveOrder\({id:'test123',title:'Test',description:'desc',budget:'100',url:'',dateCreate:'',query:'q',relevance:42}\); db.saveAiResponse\('test123','test response','openai/gpt-oss-120b'\); const orders = db.getOrders\(\); const t = orders.find\(o=>o.id==='test123'\); console.log\('order saved with ai:', !!t, 'rel:', t?.relevance, 'ai len:', t?.ai_response?.length\); console.log\('stats:', JSON.stringify\(db.getStats\(\)\)\); db.clearOrders\(\);")
